talents.name: Thrill
talents.description: Gain 16 Adaptive Attack.

talents.name: Swift
talents.description: Gain 10% Extra Attack Speed.

talents.name: Wilderness Blessing
talents.description: Movement Speed in the Jungle and River is increased by 10%. This bonus is halved when in combat with enemy heroes, Lord or Turtle.

talents.name: Seasoned Hunter
talents.description: Damage against Lord and Turtle is increased by 15%. This bonus is halved against regular Creeps and doesn't affect the damage of Retribution.

talents.name: Impure Rage
talents.description: Dealing damage with skills deals 4% of target's Max HP extra Adaptive Damage and restores 2% Mana on hit.
talents.effect: If the hero does not use Mana, restores 1% HP instead. The extra Adaptive Damage dealt to non-hero units is up to 120. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

talents.name: Quantum Charge
talents.description: Dealing damage with Basic Attacks increases Movement Speed by 30% for 1.5s and restores 75-180 HP (scales with level).

talents.name: War Cry
talents.description: After every 3 separate Basic Attacks or skills hit an enemy hero, all damage dealt increases by 8% for 6 seconds.
talents.effect: A single Basic Attack or skill that deals damage multiple times only counts as 1. Cooldown: 6 seconds.

talents.name: Temporal Reign
talents.description: The next Ultimate cast decreases other active skills' remaining cooldowns by 1.5 times within 4 seconds.
talents.effect: This effect is extended by 2 seconds after getting hero kills or assists. This only applies to the hero themselves. Cooldown: 20 seconds.

talents.name: Vitality
talents.description: Gain 225 extra max HP.

talents.name: Tenacity
talents.description: When HP is below 50%, Damage Reduction is increased by 5%.

talents.name: Concussive Blast
talents.description: After the next Basic Attack, deal 100(+7% Total HP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies.

talents.name: Rupture
talents.description: Gain 5 Adaptive Penetration.
talents.effect: Gain Physical Penetration if extra Physical Attack is higher than extra Magic Power; otherwise, gain Magic Penetration.

talents.name: Master Assassin
talents.description: If there is only one enemy hero nearby, damage dealt to them is increased by 7%.

talents.name: Killing Spree
talents.description: When damaging heroes below 30% HP, instantly recover 15% of Lost HP and gain 20% Movement Speed.
talents.effect: Reset cooldown upon killing an enemy hero. Duration: 3 seconds. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

talents.name: Inspire
talents.description: Cooldown Reduction is increased by 5% and Mana Regen by 2.

talents.name: Bargain Hunter
talents.description: Equipment can be purchased at 95% of their base price.

talents.name: Lethal Ignition
talents.description: Dealing damage greater than 7% of an enemy hero's Max HP 3 times within 5s will scorch the target for an additional 162-750 Adaptive Damage (scales with level).

talents.name: Firmness
talents.description: Gain 8 extra Physical & Magic Defense.

talents.name: Festival of Blood
talents.description: Gain 6% Spell Vamp. Each hero kill or assist grants an additional 0.5% Spell Vamp, up to 12 stacks.

talents.name: Brave Smite
talents.description: Dealing skill damage to an enemy hero recovers 5% Max HP.

talents.name: Agility
talents.description: Gain 4% extra Movement Speed.

talents.name: Pull Yourself Together
talents.description: Cooldowns of Battle Spells and equipment's active skills are reduced by 12% initially. Each hero kill or assist grants an additional 1% reduction, up to 8 stacks.

talents.name: Focusing Mark
talents.description: After damaging an enemy hero, allied heroes deal 6% more damage to them and gain 10% Movement Speed.

talents.name: Fatal
talents.description: Gain 5% Crit Chance and 5% extra Crit Damage.

talents.name: Weapon Master
talents.description: Physical Attack and Magic Power gained from equipment, emblem, talents, and skills are increased by 8%.

talents.name: Weakness Finder
talents.description: Basic Attacks slow enemies by 50% and reduce their Attack Speed by 30% for 1 second.
talents.effect: Cooldown: 10 seconds. Each Basic Attack reduces cooldown by 1 second, down to 3 seconds.
